docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-21-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HWU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION ON CURRENT ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HWU, JENNIFER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HWU, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE $899.53 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,119.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON 2/1/22 (SERVICE FEE $65) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HWU, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $899.53 FILED BY HWU, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00);[AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CHELSEA BROWN] SERVED DEC-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-24-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HWU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE IS NOT PRESENT, APPEARING CHELSEA BROWN (SHE DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE AND IS NOT AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF MODERN ACUPUNCTURE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HWU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MODERN ACUPUNCTURE IS NOT PRESENT. AFTER VOIR DIR ON SERVICE ISSUES THE COURT FINDS THAT SERVICE IS PROPER AND THAT THE AGENT OF SERVICE ACKNOWLEDGED RECEIPT OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COSTS ADJUSTED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
